commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer/author revision on the auth-epoch policy boundary plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation should not rewrite this PR without an ownership decision.; Needs attention: The diff changes an auth/session invalidation boundary and can hide local credential changes in combined mode.; Review finding: [P1] Honor auth ownership before dropping local credentials — src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts... commands.review_summary:
The PR changes CLI auth-epoch hashing to prefer auth-profile credentials over local CLI fingerprints, adds regression tests, moves CLI OAuth status labels ahead of env API keys, and updates a generated Swift protocol field.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main path is source-reproducible by mocking the Claude local credential reader from null to an OAuth credential while the auth-profile credential stays unchanged; the resolver hashes different part lists and cli-session maps the mismatch to auth-epoch invalidation.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/author revision on the auth-epoch policy boundary plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation should not rewrite this PR without an ownership decision.

target.title: fix(cli-auth-epoch): exclude local credential from epoch when auth-profile is present
target.author: hclsys
